Enterprise AI data leakage prevention tool, managed by your Security and Compliance department via AiRysk.

AiRysk is an enterprise browser data loss prevention platform built for modern AI and web workflows. It helps organizations detect and prevent sensitive data exposure across AI prompts, file uploads, and browser submissions, including source code, credentials, PCI, PHI, and PII. AiRysk pairs a Chromium extension with a locally installed endpoint agent so inspection and enforcement can happen on device before data leaves the machine, with scope controlled by enterprise policy. Depending on your requirements, AiRysk can be deployed for targeted coverage of approved applications or expanded to broader site coverage when your threat model demands it.

AiRysk uses an agentic architecture to improve accuracy and reduce noise in high risk workflows. Instead of a single monolithic detector, specialized domain agents focus on specific data types and contexts, applying purpose built classification and validation logic, then coordinating a unified allow, block, or coach decision. This approach is designed to minimize false positives, preserve productivity, and provide explainable outcomes that security teams can operationalize.

Credential Agent: Protects passwords, tokens, API keys, and secrets across AI prompts and web forms.
Source Code and IP Agent: Detects proprietary code, snippets, and internal technical IP to prevent unintended disclosure.
PCI Agent: Identifies payment card data and payment related fields to support PCI aligned controls.
PHI and Healthcare Agent: Detects protected health information patterns and healthcare identifiers for regulated workflows.
PII and Identity Agent: Flags personal identifiers and sensitive identity attributes to reduce privacy risk and meet compliance needs.
